name: GOLFTEC Appleton
about: GOLFTEC Appleton is part of a nationwide golf instruction and technology center chain that uses data-driven coaching methods. The facility provides indoor golf lessons, club fittings, and practice sessions using advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to analyze swing mechanics. Their coaching team consists of PGA-certified instructors who create personalized game plans for players of all skill levels. Lessons focus on measurable improvement, with a noted average of 21 more yards gained off the tee through their fitting process.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION and launch monitor technology
Personalized game plans created by PGA-certified coaches
Club fitting services optimized for an average 21-yard increase in distance
Indoor practice with professional-grade launch monitors and video feedback

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for club fitting and practice sessions with launch monitor data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions. GOLFTEC does offer club rentals if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes time is not specified, but typical indoor simulator sessions are 1-2 hours depending on the package chosen.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs and instruction, making it suitable for youth golfers, though specific kid-friendly amenities are not detailed.
